text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for summer camp, a place where runners
train to improve their skills, but Seiun Sky is only
interested in fishing in the ocean.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even with her rivals working hard, she declares
she's going to fish first and heads off to a rocky
beach.
